suggestions.name: ArrayReverser
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit focused exclusively on reversing array elements, either for entire arrays or specific ranges. They share identical algorithmic patterns and parameter validation logi

suggestions.name: ArrayTypeConverter
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit responsible for converting wrapper object arrays to primitive arrays across all Java primitive types. They share common conversion patterns, null-handling logic, and

suggestions.name: ArrayInspector
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit focused on inspecting and analyzing array properties without modification. They provide read-only operations for examining array characteristics like length, bounds
